steps.text: When it is morning, the sun comes up. What do you think the sky looks like? Press Wake up and see!
steps.feedback: Because it is morning, the sun rises. The sky turns light. Morning brings the sun!

steps.text: Now it is midday. The sun has been climbing all morning. Where do you think it is now? Press Lunch!
steps.feedback: Because it is midday, the sun is right at the top. The higher the clock goes, the higher the sun climbs!

steps.text: Now press Bedtime. What do you think will happen to the sun?
steps.feedback: Because it is night time, the sun went away — and the moon came out! When the sun goes down, the moon comes up.
